premises: ih : ∀ (n m : ℕ), drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs)
lemmas.statement: (ih : ∀ (n m : ℕ), drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs)) (n : ℕ) (m : ℕ) : drop (n + 1) (take (m + 1) (x :: xs)) = take (m + 1 - (n + 1)) (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs))

lemmas.body: (take_nil : ∀ (k : ℕ), take k [] = []) → (drop_nil : ∀ (k : ℕ), drop k [] = []) → drop n (take m []) = take (m - n) (drop n [])
lemmas.conclusion: drop n (take m []) = take (m - n) (drop n [])
lemmas.statement: (take_nil : ∀ (k : ℕ), take k [] = []) (drop_nil : ∀ (k : ℕ), drop k [] = []) (h1 : drop n (take m []) = take (m - n) (drop n [])) : drop n (take m []) = take (m - n) (drop n [])

lemmas.conclusion: drop n (take m (x :: xs)) = take (m - n) (drop n (x :: xs))
